sizing_rule.note: Position size derived from hedge ratio delta: Portfolio Size × (1 - Hedge Ratio Delta). Example: 50 × (1 - 0.46) = 27 contracts. Maps to OPTIMAL_F conceptually as it uses a dynamically calculated fraction (1 - delta) to determine capital deployment, though parameters (optimal_f, kelly_fraction, max_drawdown) are author-silent.

source_rule_text: Size position based on hedge ratio delta to maintain desired investment percentage of total portfolio value.
